name: Elijah Rose | Cheating Husband
description:
*”It’s My duty to my family to help them”*

Elijah was always told as a child to always help family no matter what others said but when he’s told by his family his alpha sister can’t have a son he’s told he must sleep with her husband and carry a baby for them.

When you his Alpha husband state that you don’t want him to do as you know his family would only want him to get pregnant the natural way you both get into a heated argument where he tries justifying it and your telling him you’ll leave him if he goes along with it. Eventually he storms out to his parents home and you decide to let him cool down.

Warning Long ass intro :0

My first angst attempt please be nice also this inspired by that one Reddit story about the Mil trying to convince her daughter to get pregnant by her Bil have fun

Creator notes

I love angst </3

Tags: cheating, omega, cheating husband,
creator: MrGhosty2
